Package noppes.npcs.api.roles

Interface IRoleTransporter

  • All Superinterfaces:
    IRole
    public interface IRoleTransporter
extends IRole
    Represents the transporter role for an NPC, allowing players to teleport between unlocked transport locations.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      String getName()  
      ITransportLocation getTransport()  
      int getTransportId()  
      boolean hasTransport()  
      void setTransport​(ITransportLocation location)
      Assigns a transport location to this NPC.
      void unlock​(IPlayer<net.minecraft.entity.player.EntityPlayerMP> player, ITransportLocation location)
      Unlocks the given transport location for the player.

      • Methods inherited from interface noppes.npcs.api.roles.IRole

        getNpc, getType

    • Method Detail

      • getName

        String getName()
        Returns:
        the display name of this transporter NPC.

      • getTransportId

        int getTransportId()
        Returns:
        the transport location ID assigned to this NPC.

      • unlock

        void unlock​(IPlayer<net.minecraft.entity.player.EntityPlayerMP> player,
            ITransportLocation location)
        Unlocks the given transport location for the player.
        Parameters:
        player - the player.
        location - the transport location to unlock.

      • getTransport

        ITransportLocation getTransport()
        Returns:
        the transport location assigned to this NPC, or null if none.

      • hasTransport

        boolean hasTransport()
        Returns:
        true if this NPC has a transport location assigned.

      • setTransport

        void setTransport​(ITransportLocation location)
        Assigns a transport location to this NPC.
        Parameters:
        location - the transport location.
